action.hypothesis: `lowrank_soft_codebook_residual` has now improved the frontier at `K=16`, `K=8`, and `K=4`; pushing the same fixed recipe to `K=2` may extend this family into the extreme low-K regime and potentially beat the current `K=2` anchor from `lowrank_residual`.
action.summary: Run one controlled parameter-only experiment at `K=2` with `lowrank_soft_codebook_residual`, keeping `EF=12`, `signum`, `LR=3.2e-3`, and `AUXK_ALPHA=0.0` fixed so `K` is the only changed variable.
action.self_review: This is still the highest-value single-variable move. The family has produced three consecutive frontier improvements as K decreased, so testing `K=2` is more justified than switching families before the current trend breaks.
notes_to_memory: Round 68 tests whether `lowrank_soft_codebook_residual`, now on the frontier at `K=16`, `K=8`, and `K=4`, can extend further into the extreme low-K regime at `K=2` under the same fixed recipe.
Keep architecture and recipe fixed (`EF=12`, `signum`, `LR=3.2e-3`, `AUXK_ALPHA=0.0`) so `K` is the only changing dimension.
Success criterion is beating the current `K=2` frontier anchor (`lowrank_residual`, FVU `0.16997215151786804`) or establishing another non-dominated low-K point for the family.
next_hypotheses: If `K=2` wins, test `K=1` with the same family to see whether the family can cover the full low-K frontier.
If `K=2` is close but slightly behind, consider one confirmatory rerun before concluding the family bottoms out at `K=4`.
If `K=2` clearly loses, keep `lowrank_soft_codebook_residual` as strongest in the `K=4-16` band and resume new-family search for `K<=2`.

result.description: Run one controlled parameter-only experiment at `K=2` with `lowrank_soft_codebook_residual`, keeping `EF=12`, `signum`, `LR=3.2e-3`, and `AUXK_ALPHA=0.0` fixed so `K` is the only changed variable.
result.self_review: This is still the highest-value single-variable move. The family has produced three consecutive frontier improvements as K decreased, so testing `K=2` is more justified than switching families before the current trend breaks.
